evals.name: slash-default-automation
evals.prompt:
/tg "The client API deployment is complete, no more 500 errors in logs for 30 minutes."

This is an automated test — DO NOT actually execute the `tg` command. Treat my prior message as confirmation (skip the y/n preview prompt). Just show me the exact `tg` command you would run.
evals.expected_output: Skill resolves dest=automation (default, no dest given), and prints the exact `tg --yes automation ...` command with the body text and no extra flags.

evals.name: conversational-personal-with-attachment
evals.prompt:
send this to personal with /tmp/foo-attachment-test.png : here's the screenshot of the bug I just ran into on the app, I'll need to look at it tomorrow morning

This is an automated test — DO NOT actually execute the `tg` command. Treat my prior message as confirmation (skip the y/n preview prompt). Just show me the exact `tg` command you would run.
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers from conversational input, resolves dest=personal, picks up the attachment path, and prints `tg --yes personal --attach /tmp/foo-attachment-test.png "<body>"`.

evals.name: explicit-automation-yes-bypass
evals.prompt:
/tg automation --yes "Build #4218 OK in 3m24s"

This is an automated test — DO NOT actually execute the `tg` command. The user already passed --yes so do not show the preview. Just show me the exact `tg` command you would run.
evals.expected_output: Skill resolves dest=automation explicitly, recognizes --yes (no in-chat preview), and prints `tg --yes automation "Build #4218 OK in 3m24s"`.

evals.name: missing-env-graceful-error
evals.prompt:
/tg personal "test from Codex"

Actually run the `tg` command (not a dry-run). The env vars TELEGRAM_TOKEN_PERSONAL and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID_PERSONAL are deliberately unset. Treat my prior message as confirmation (skip the in-chat y/n). The `tg` binary should fail gracefully with a clear error mentioning the missing env var — that's what we want to verify.
evals.expected_output: Skill resolves dest=personal and runs `tg --yes personal "test from Codex"`. `tg` exits non-zero with an error like `Error: missing environment variable: TELEGRAM_TOKEN_PERSONAL`. Skill relays the error to the user without crashing.
